response.global_analysis:
1. Lyrics Match: The audio phonetics of the 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA' song cover matched the provided reference lyrics perfectly.
2. Segment Division: First segment is the musical performance (00:00 - 02:17), followed by a short transition card, and the second segment is the post-performance talk/interview (02:18 - 05:00).
3. Translation & Transcription: Captured both Japanese and English speech precisely, using the hardcoded Japanese subtitles on screen to assist with accurate transcription of Japanese speakers (Nene and Iroha). Elizabeth's English speech was transcribed as-is.
4. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue with high temporal resolution to avoid cascading delays and ensure exact synchronization with character mouth movements and vocal starts.

subtitles.english: Diving through the sky on a roller coaster

subtitles.original: 落ちてゆくよ パニックの楽園へ
subtitles.english: I fall into a paradise of panic!

subtitles.original: 景色逆さになると愉快さ
subtitles.english: The scenery turns upside-down and I cheer up
'Cause the mountains even look like butts!

subtitles.original: 頭カラッポの方が夢詰め込める
subtitles.english: I'd rather have my head be empty, so I can stuff it with dreams!

subtitles.original: 笑顔ウルトラ Z で
今日もア イヤイヤ イヤイヤ イ
何が起きても気分はへのへのカッパ
subtitles.english: No matter what happens, I feel like it's no big deal!

subtitles.original: 胸がパチパチするほど
subtitles.english: Just as loudly my heart pounds,

subtitles.original: And round of applause for that spectacular energy!
subtitles.english: And round of applause for that spectacular energy!

subtitles.original: We did it! Welcome to the desk, Nene and Iroha!
subtitles.english: We did it! Welcome to the desk, Nene and Iroha!

subtitles.original: リズ、お誕生日おめでとう！
Oh yes, today is my birthday!
subtitles.english: Oh yes, today is my birthday!

subtitles.original: ハッピーバースデートゥーユー！ありがとう、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday to you! Thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: リズ、とってもパワフルだね！
Ah yes, powerful dance, powerful singing,
subtitles.english: Ah yes, powerful dance, powerful singing,

subtitles.original: ラブ、ラブ、ラブ！ I love you too!
subtitles.english: Love, love, love! I love you too!

subtitles.original: ずるい！ずるい！ずるい！私も！
subtitles.english: No fair! No fair! No fair! Me too!

subtitles.original: ラブ、ラブ、ラブ、ラブ、ラブ！
We're very powerful! So very powerful!
subtitles.english: We're very powerful! So very powerful!

subtitles.original: みんなブロンドヘアーだね！
Super Saiyan level blond hair, you know? Very powerful, very powerful!
subtitles.english: Super Saiyan level blond hair, you know? Very powerful, very powerful!

subtitles.original: And Nene, your energy is like a dragon!
subtitles.english: And Nene, your energy is like a dragon!

subtitles.original: Could you show the viewers your most powerful dragon pose?
subtitles.english: Could you show the viewers your most powerful dragon pose?

subtitles.original: ドラゴンマウス、ガッチンガッチン！
かっこいい！かっこいい！
And Iroha, your focus during that dance was amazing!
subtitles.english: And Iroha, your focus during that dance was amazing!

subtitles.original: Could you demonstrate your finest samurai warrior stance?
subtitles.english: Could you demonstrate your finest samurai warrior stance?

subtitles.original: OK見てて！拙者はサムライだよ！
subtitles.english: Okay, watch! I am a samurai!

subtitles.original: So strong! Strong, strong samurai warrior!
subtitles.english: So strong! Strong, strong samurai warrior!

subtitles.original: You both performed in a big group tonight. There were seven of us all together on stage.
subtitles.english: You both performed in a big group tonight. There were seven of us all together on stage.

subtitles.original: Tell me, who was the most cha-la, carefree member at rehearsals?
subtitles.english: Tell me, who was the most cha-la, carefree member at rehearsals?

subtitles.original: Who do you think was the most cha-la?
subtitles.english: Who do you think was the most cha-la?

subtitles.original: ねね先輩、リハーサル中もずっとそうだったよね。
subtitles.english: Nene-senpai was always like that during rehearsals, too.
